title: laurus azorica var. lutea
intro: Laurus azorica var. lutea, also known as Canary Island golden laurel or yellow laurel, is a rare and endemic evergreen tree native to the Canary Islands. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health issues such as wounds, fever, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Laurus azorica var. lutea include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Laurus azorica var. lutea include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other topical applications.
